RichText.Text: 1. be aimed at directing the world's attention to... guided tours aimed at raising protection awareness aim to protect the delicate ecosystem with the aim/objective/goal of doing... 2. be formally established/founded in 1961 3. the creation of... creative adj. creativity n. 4. make a commitment to doing... be committed to doing... 5. cover an area of ... 6. stand as a remarkable example 7. be located/situated in... 8. be recognized as... in recognition of its ecological importance 9. immerse oneself in the thick rainforest be immersed in reading a book 10. be unique to the place a unique experience

TextRun.Text: 一个显著的例子存在（堪称典范

RichText.Text: 1. 旨在将全世界的目光投向…… 旨在提升保护意识的讲解游览 旨在保护脆弱的生态系统 目的是做某事 2. 于 1961 年正式成立/建立 3. …… 的创立 / 创作 创造性的 创造力 4. 致力于/承诺做某事 致力于做某事 5. 占地面积为…… 6. 作为一个显著的例子存在（堪称典范） 7. 坐落于 / 位于…… 8. 被公认为…… 为赞扬其重要的生态价值 9. 沉浸在茂密雨林之中 沉浸在书本阅读中 10. 此地独有的 一次独特的体验
